biological_replicate: the TBL3 cell line was derived from in vitro infection of the spontaneous bovine-B lymphosarcoma cell line, BL3...
technical_replicate: plating 1 × 10^4 cells in 96-well plates in triplicate
experimental_design: we monitored the levels of the endogenous PKM2 protein in parasite-infected TBL3 cells, compared to non-infected BL3 cells
factor_value: treatment with two pharmacological PPIase inhibitors, Buparvaquone or Juglone
number_of_biological_replicates: TBL3 cell line and BL3 cells
